name: genius-makers
description: Cade Metz's Genius Makers — narrative toolkit for understanding the deep learning revolution, the maverick researchers who drove it, and the corporate wars that shaped modern AI
useCase: Understand the history of AI from ImageNet to GPT, learn from the key personalities, analyze the corporate AI race, and explore AI ethics and risks
knownRisks: The AI field evolves rapidly — some details may already be dated
Metz is a journalist, not a technical expert — some technical explanations are simplified
The narrative focus on personalities may underemphasize the importance of broader institutional and economic factors
